expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: SKILL.md, README.md, reference.md, and AGENTS docs stay aligned
expectations.evidence: The run explicitly covers SKILL.md/README.md/reference.md alignment, but cannot evaluate AGENTS docs: result.md states “AGENTS docs (not present in provided evidence; see Blockers)” and “Unable to assess. No AGENTS/agents documentation was included…”. Since the expectation includes AGENTS docs staying aligned, this is not fully satisfied.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase docs
expectations.evidence: The output identifies an internal docs misalignment: README.md claims Phase 7 produces “developer_smoke_test_<feature-id>.md”, while reference.md Phase 7 artifact families list only “context/finalization_record_<feature-id>.md” and “qa_plan_final.md”, and SKILL.md Phase 7 also does not mention the smoke test artifact. This means the documented outputs are not fully aligned with the primary phase docs.
